programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: The Case: Mortal Ties (Stéphane Touvet)
programme.desc: Stéphane Touvet, then a captain in the Paris research department, is plunged into the investigation of his life, a double murder with a background of sexual games.

programme.title: The Case: Murder in the Vineyards
programme.desc: On December 6, 2012, Jean Aprin's lifeless body was found on his Roquebrussanne winery.

programme.title: The Case: A Crime Too Perfect (Stephane Fournier)
programme.desc: It all started on the night of February 26 to 27, 2012. It was half past midnight when Stéphane Fournier arrived at the forest of Saint Lambert des Bois.

programme.title: The Case: The Perpignan Station Murders
programme.desc: From 1995, a series of rapes, followed by murders shook the region of Perpignan.

programme.title: The Case: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)
programme.desc: Véronique Béchu has handled hundreds of rape and incest cases. The protection of minors is its hobbyhorse. But the police commander will never forget one investigation.
programme.sub-title: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Insurance
programme.desc: A drawer affair where women multiply around a modern bluebeard.

programme.title: The Case: Dangerous Games (Benoit Pinel)
programme.desc: In 2004, Benoît Pinel and his team were called following the discovery of a body drifting on the Seine.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet
programme.desc: The summer of 2007, a young girl walks on the beach and a human foot in a sneaker. Less than a week later, a couple discovers another running shoe with a foot inside of it south of there. Thus begins the mystery of the disembodied feet.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Heatwaves
programme.desc: Temperatures in places like Saudi Arabia routinely exceed 40 degrees Celsius with very little effect on the population. However, when the same extreme heat struck the people of Russia in 2010, it killed an estimated 56,000 people.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Landslides
programme.desc: Nothing can be done to prevent a landslide once it starts; they are among the most ferocious and devastating forces in nature.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Famine
programme.desc: Every continent on Earth has experienced this terrifying phenomenon at some point in its history. It’s ravaged the world for centuries, as crop infestation, drought, flooding and disease have killed thousands.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Floods
programme.desc: Water may seem harmless, but in enormous quantities, it can be an astonishingly destructive force. Apart from famine, floods have resulted in more deaths worldwide than any other natural disaster.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Volcanoes
programme.desc: Human history is littered with the stories of gigantic volcanic eruptions and the tragic fates of those who could not outrun the burning lava and poisonous gases. In our own times, volcanoes continue to cause large-scale destruction.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Italia Wild
programme.desc: In Italy, George studies avalanches of Dolomite Mountains, meets engineers who keep Venice from sinking, and heads South to explore Italy's explosive volcanoes: Vesuvius, Etna and Stromboli.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.
programme.sub-title: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Banger Boys Darren and Pope are hot contenders for a major race, but their mortal enemies, the Dreambusters, are out to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Steve turns a 1960s Wolsey into a dream machine, driving it in a race that he has a personal connection to. Meanwhile, the Dreamers must source dozens of cars for a TV action stunt.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Taking a trip down memory lane, Steve visits the place where his banger obsession began and sources a car for the last leg of the racing season.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: In the series climax, Steve tries to win the World Banger Racing Championship. Meanwhile, Flip and Steve need to win their qualifying races before they can get through to the final match.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Steve fights for a shot at the World Banger Championship, and winning an upcoming race may give him the crucial points needed to qualify for the big event.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Dougie does a deep dive when he completely builds out the rear end assembly for our 1969 GTX. Mark and George break out the hydraulics to reverse the damage done to Mark's newest acquisition. And a Graveyard favorite returns.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: 72 Charger SE Resurrected
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Operation Firepower?
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Flight of the Super Bee
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghouls race to finish a one owner 1970 Super Bee that belongs to a decorated retired Marine. But as Mark and Justin forge ahead on this one owner car a SNAFU on Will's side of the shop may cause a total mission failure.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Un-Boxed
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Will Gets Grumpy
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A Reynolds 'Cuda Reunion
programme.desc: When Tony D'Agostino makes another trip to the west coast Mark Worman takes the opportunity to revisit the Brothers Car Collection in Salem Oregon to do a deep dive on a 1971 Hemi 'Cuda that shares history with the Sandwich Man himself.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Phantom 'Cuda Rides Again
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Hellafury
programme.desc: The Graveyard is covered in an unexpected blanket of snow prompting Mark to install its first mausoleum. Meanwhile the ghouls turn their focus on a 1969 GTX installing its ornamentation and chrome.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Road Runner is In-Violet Dougie is Plum Crazy.
programme.desc: Road Runners are overrunning the shop! Will continues to train his son Brody as the Graveyard's newest painter.
programme.sub-title: The Road Runner is In-Violet Dougie is Plum Crazy.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cuda 'Tat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taking Home the Bronze
programme.desc: See the beautiful Turbine-Bonze Metallic 1968 Charger meticulously resurrected and revealed to its proud owner.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Judgement Day
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mission Commission
programme.desc: After chasing it for an entire year, Charles finally finds and buys the classy 1962 Chrysler 300 he's been dreaming of. He and his team now face the challenge of having only ten days to give it the period correct customization.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Crescent City Cuda
programme.desc: The guys are asked by famed car collector, Tim Wellborne, to create the "most beautiful car that never was"-- the 1970 Paint Chip 'Cuda to feature in his musclecar museum.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed
programme.desc: An unlucky psychiatrist somehow winds up with Jethro as a patient.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted
programme.desc: The psychiatrist shows an interest in Granny’s mountain remedies.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Ellie Becomes A Secretary
programme.desc: The Clampetts offer to help out at Drysdale’s bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro's Friend
programme.desc: The Clampetts show Jethro’s friend how to have some fun

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Gets The Misery
programme.desc: Jed feels poorly, and the family is worried about him. To make Elly feel better, Jed reveals that he is faking an illness to please Granny. Drysdale fakes an illness as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Hair-Raising Holiday
programme.desc: A doctor blows the whistle on Granny’s mountain-medicine practice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Garden
programme.desc: Granny wants to plough the front lawn of the mansion to grow vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Starts To School
programme.desc: Elly May is preparing for her first day of the Willows, a finishing school Mrs. Drysdale recommended where she hopes the girls will offend Elly and run the Clampetts out of town.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampett Look
programme.desc: A new fashion -- “The Clampett Look” -- comes to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro's First Love
programme.desc: Jethro falls in love with a stripper named Chickadee Laverne and takes her home to meet the family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Chickadee Returns
programme.desc: Chickadee (Barbara Nichols) returns with a new act.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Are Overdrawn
programme.desc: Jed’s bank statement is switched with an unemployed actor with a similar name.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Go Hollywood
programme.desc: Jake and Opal Clampett are continuing to stay at the Clampett mansion. Jethro and Elly both decide they want to get in the movie business, and the two get help from Jake and Opal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Turkey Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale’s turkey escapes into the Clampett household and finds a home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Garden Party
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale is having a garden party and tells the Clampetts not to attend. However, they misunderstand and think she wants them to come.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Needs A Maw
programme.desc: Jed visits the bank to tell Drysdale that he plans to go back home to look for a wife. When Mrs. Fenwick visits, Drysdale decides that she would be perfect.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Culture
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: A Man For Elly
programme.desc: Granny loves one TV Western star, Quirt Manly, and Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Giant Jackrabbit
programme.desc: A kangaroo invades the world of the Clampetts, but Granny thinks it’s a big rabbit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Girl From Home
programme.desc: An old beau shows up to marry Jethro for his money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Lafe Lingers On
programme.desc: Lafe Crick returns to the Clampett mansion looking to get rich off of Jed's money. He tries to get a job at the bank guarding Jed's money, only to get a few million of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Race For Queen
programme.desc: Bob Cummings plays himself and must judge a beauty contest.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Strike Oil
programme.desc: In the first episode Jed Clampett strikes oil, sells his land and moves to a 35 room mansion in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Getting Settled
programme.desc: When they arrive at their new mansion they are mistaken for backwoods servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin
programme.desc: The Clampetts find that the comforts of the mansion do not always compare with the comforts of their shack back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale describes Mrs. Drysdale as being a hypochondriac, the Clampetts assume she must be a drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys Stock
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggest buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens. Meanwhile, Granny has plans to sober up Mrs. Drysdale, who the family believes is a lush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Trick Or Treat
programme.desc: The Clampetts are feeling homesick so they decide to go visit their new neighbours. Little do they know, it is Halloween, a holiday they have never heard of.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Servants
programme.desc: Drysdale attempts another step insocial renovation of the Clampetts by lending them his servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS
programme.desc: Imaging a black hole was a breakthrough in astronomy, now with the new satellite IXPE high energy telescope we will be looking at some of the most dramatic, and most violent objects in the universe: Colliding Black holes and Neutron Stars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.
programme.sub-title: Set Course For Heart of the Sun

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive
programme.desc: The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: One hundred kilometres above the Earth’s surface lies an invisible frontier: the edge of space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Planet X
programme.desc: The New Horizons mission continues deeper into space, it’s next target looming close.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Four Robbers
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, and later Thailand, a band of four robbers steal and kill, as their fiercely loyal leader sticks to his principles.

programme.title: Descent
programme.desc: A team of scientists are gathered to prevent a global catastrophe. But one of the scientists realizes early on that the cause of volcanic reactions is most likely due to a secret government operation investigating alternative energy resources.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: Two rival teams of assassins. One killer day at the office. An all-star cast including Rob Corddry, Ellen Barkin, Zach Galifianakis, Ving Rhames, and Jeffrey Tambor fight to the death to be the last man standing in this hilarious action comedy!

programme.title: Hunt to Kill: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: When Jim's (Steve Austin of TV's WWE) teenage daughter is kidnapped, he's forced to lead a band of ruthless killers into the wilderness to retrieve their share of a missing heist score.

programme.title: One In The Chamber
programme.desc: A seasoned assassin plays both sides in a Russian gang war and becomes the target of an unknown enemy. Starring Cuba Gooding Jr. (JERRY MCGUIRE) and Dolph Lundgren (ROCKY IV).

programme.title: Kill Zone
programme.desc: The shadow of war follows a troubled Iraq War vet as he is forced to pursue one of his own into the Pacific Northwest wilderness to finally confront a war crime that has haunted them both.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: The Battle of Midway: Dauntless
programme.desc: A U.S. carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway in June 1942. During the battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea. Amid the vast openness of the Pacific, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: Four Robbers
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, and later Thailand, a band of four robbers steal and kill, as their fiercely loyal leader sticks to his principles.

programme.title: Bloodlines
programme.desc: In November 1999, Dr Colin Bouwer, the Head of Psychiatry at Otago Hospital, put a murderous plan into action. A perfect crime, until Andrew Bowers, a young consultant physician, stumbled upon the murder in process.

programme.title: Deadly Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters Janna and Callie are fierce rivals. Janna has the perfect job, and beautiful daughter, Fiona. Callie drifts from job to job and has stepped over the line with the law on her most recent one as a nurse.

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Starring Dani Kind and Michelle Stafford. When Dawna Williams' college-aged daughter goes missing, she investigates her daughter's disappearance herself, unaware that her biggest supporter is also the man who may have murdered her child.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: A man implicated in the triple homicide of three Hollywood starlets begins his own investigation. Needing assistance, he enlists the two detectives on his tail in order to expose a conspiracy more explosive than any of them imagined.

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer is caught between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm's senior partner. When the case turns deadly, he must find the truth or lose everything.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fibre-optic cable deal.

programme.title: American Heist
programme.desc: Two brothers with checkered pasts, one struggling on the road to normalcy, the other just released from prison, intertwine when one drags the other into an ill-fated bank robbery spearheaded by a gang of dangerous criminals.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: A Woman Hunted
programme.desc: A young mother (Alexandra Paul) is released from drug rehabilitation and trying to get custody of her daughters (Chelsea Ceci and Tanya Trombetta) when she becomes a suspect in the murder of a professional athlete (Tim Post).

programme.title: Black Box: Black Box
programme.desc: Marcus is the only survivor of a space accident and he ends up trapped in a damaged escape pod, injured and experiencing memory loss. He contacts ground control, but he'll need to remember what happened if they are to help him make it back alive to Earth.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky believes he has picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to discover that aliens are already on Earth and in the process of preparing to take it over.

programme.title: Prospect
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her father travel to a remote alien moon to harvest the moon's elusive gems.

programme.title: Dark Encounter

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs microscopic fibers a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After a disastrous opening night, both teams prepare for the next challenge; a contestant starts to succumb to the pressure; a challenge tests food-preparation skills; another chef must leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams prepare breakfast for men and women of the US Armed Forces dining in the kitchen, one contestant falls seriously ill and another chef has to leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: When the losing team is unable to identify some commonplace items in a taste-test challenge, chef Gordon Ramsay orders a grotesque taste-testing practise that turns several stomachs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining seven chefs must present a meal for a wedding reception at the restaurant. The teams race to make sure they do not disappoint the newlyweds or the hungry bridal party.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: One of the chefs changes teams and each team must prepare three lobster dishes in an hour. Another chef faces elimination and has to leave at the end of the day.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining six chefs must turn leftovers into meals in 30 minutes, and the winning team gets a chance for revenge on chef Ramsay. Poor communication may signal the end for one contestant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay combines the remaining five chefs into one team; the chefs must compete head-to-head with individual dishes to impress trendsetters. Two contestants have a heated power-struggle and chef Ramsay makes a heartfelt offer.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs must transform classic American dishes into entrées worthy of fine dining; the contestants' mothers vote on their favourite entrées without knowing who made them; chef Ramsay chooses the two finalists.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final two chefs design and run their own restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay brings in helping hands to staff the dinner service in the final challenge; tempers flare between competitors; the winner becomes the new head chef of one of Ramsay's Las Vegas restaurants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Fifteen vie for the position of executive chef at Gordon Ramsay's new restaurant, scheduled to open in the summer of 2008; Gordon gets physically sick from a contestant's concoction; one contestant goes missing.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each team must accurately slice a halibut into six-ounce fillets; one member of each team must work as the maitre d' while the others staff the kitchen; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are made to catch hens in their living room to prepare for a family-style chicken dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: On family night, the team that makes the most fresh pasta for that night's dinner service wins a day of fun at the Santa Monica Pier. An accident sends one contestant to the hospital.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The aspiring chefs compete to create the best gourmet pizza, after which the winning team will enjoy a gourmet meal in Santa Barbara and the losing team will take and deliver pizza orders.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must create four dishes with 20 ingredients and a medic rushes to the kitchen when one team member slices more than food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must prepare dishes in a relay race; the winning team gets a day of fun in the sun; the losing team must clean the entire restaurant; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Two teams are combined into one, and each chef is given one main ingredient and asked to create a dish suitable to chef Ramsay's palate; during the dinner service, the chefs have difficulty getting food out to the patrons.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to teach cooking-impaired housewives how to make a gourmet meal; chefs Mark Peel and Ben Ford treat the challenge winner to a one-on-one course; the chefs struggle to balance a dozen appetisers, entrées and desserts.

programme.title: Andromeda: A Symmetry of Imperfection
programme.desc: When Rommie becomes too emotional, the ship cuts her access in order to run diagnostics.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: After being left stranded near a black hole, Captain Dylan Hunt is discovered by a mercenary salvage ship and finds he has been frozen in time for 300 years.

programme.title: Andromeda: An Affirming Flame
programme.desc: Dylan protects the Andromeda from mercenaries while Beka starts to wonder if they are fighting for the wrong side.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan finds a space station full of kids who believe he is there to bring peace by killing their enemies.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: The Andromeda crew is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Andromeda: Double Helix
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Banks of the Lethe
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancée, 300 years in the past.

programme.title: Andromeda: A Rose in the Ashes
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called F lash.
programme.sub-title: The Pearls That Were His Eyes

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her sister ship, the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day.

programme.title: Andromeda: Music of a Distant Drum
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper 2.0
programme.desc: Harper receives the gift of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being sought by a bounty hunter who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forced Perspective
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Sum of Its Parts
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way
programme.desc: Gerentex is back, and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.
programme.sub-title: Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way

programme.title: Andromeda: The Devil Take the Hindmost
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society to stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Honey Offering
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.
programme.sub-title: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killing Fields of Truro
programme.desc: For the 2008 launch of Crime Investigation Australia, CI presents the complete and compelling story of "The Killing Fields of Truro", one of the most infamous crimes in Australia and yet another set in Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Murder of Innocence: Sian Kingi
programme.desc: On 27 November 1987, 12-year-old Noosa school girl Sian Kingi was grabbed off her push bike by Valmae Fay Beck and Barrie John Watts as she rode home from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.
programme.sub-title: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Ivan Milat: The Backpacker Murders
programme.desc: The backpacker murder case in the Belanglo State Forest, south west of Sydney, has entered Australian criminal folklore.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killer Punch / The Will of Death
programme.desc: Sometime on the evening of 19 October 1990, the flamboyantly gay Sydney socialite Ludwig Gertsch was strangled with an elastic strap in the bedroom of his lover, Mr. Vincent Esposito.
programme.sub-title: The Killer Punch / The Will of Death

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Body in the Sports Bag
programme.desc: A young Sydney man was found guilty of strangling his ex-girlfriend and stuffing the teenager's body in a cricket bag.
programme.sub-title: The Body in the Sports Bag

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Disappearance of Donald Mackay
programme.desc: A small group of local criminals with mafia connections were making vast fortunes in the famous NSW Riverina irrigation district from marijuana plantations.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron
programme.desc: Rodney Francis Cameron was dubbed ‘The Lonely Hearts Killer’ after he used a radio match-making program in 1990 to lure an unsuspecting woman to her death. Incredibly, he had only just been released from prison for two other killings in 1974.
programme.sub-title: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Buried Alive: Luckman and Reid
programme.desc: On the night of 4 May 1982, 13-year-old Terry Ryan rushed into his family home in Marsden, a suburb of Brisbane, and told his mother an astonishing story.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke
programme.desc: In 1959, the carefree culture of Perth changed forever when a plague of crime hit the city. By early 1963, the crime wave had escalated to serial murder.
programme.sub-title: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole finally get a job they enjoy: working at a gas station, where there are plenty of guys to flirt with; but a confrontation erupts when Albert and Janet tell the girls to stay away from the small town boys, and the girls disobey them.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reminisce about their month in Altus, make amends, and say goodbye to the people they’ve come to know before returning to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Leeza Gibbons hosts a look back at Paris’ and Nicole’s stay in Altus, Arkansas, as the girls reunite with the Leding family in front of a studio audience.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole depart from Miami Beach toward their first destination, the Batten Family Ranch.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: A stop in Texas brings Paris and Nicole to their new host family; the women convince the Lutz-Carillos boys to sneak out with them to go tanning.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole adjust to a rule against profanity in the household of their new hosts, devout members of a gospel choir; the pair get jobs with a minor league baseball team.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop at a ranch in Texas, where they give the father tips on being romantic with his wife; the pair get jobs at the local sheriff's station but their wild antics do not impress the boss.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work on a cattle drive in Texas but take matters into their own hands when they discover the herd is going to the slaughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: After once again giving up their lives of luxury, Paris and Nicole take a bus to stay with their first host family and prepare for their first internship as car mechanics.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls move on to Staten Island, where they live with an Italian-American family and do an internship at an advertising agency, where they clash with their straitlaced supervisor.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole arrive in Pennsylvania, where they stay with a family whose cat injures Nicole's dog, while their internship involves working at an airport.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reach New Jersey, where they attempt to help their host family quit smoking and become spooked by their internship at a funeral home.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Back in Pennsylvania, Paris and Nicole must cope with a plastic surgery internship which is less than glamorous, and bond with their fun loving host family.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole's next stop is Baltimore, Maryland, where they work at a local news station and try to fulfill the rock dreams of their host family's eldest son.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop in Delaware, where they help their new host family with a space problem, while their internship is at a lively daycare center.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole continue their travels through Maryland, living with a host family who Paris offers to cook for, and working at a bakery.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: As their latest internship with a psychic is only a short distance away, Paris and Nicole remain at the Foot family home, where they attempt to match make.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Back in New Jersey, Paris and Nicole work at an elderly living center, where they give the seniors a day to remember, before teaching their host family about the cruelty of hunting.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stay with a mother and son in Miami whose unusual pets prove useful for their ad agency internship, which involves creating a campaign for a new breakfast sandwich.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Havoc ensues when Paris and Nicole begin an internship with the Atlantic City Fire Department, while they task themselves with finding the daughter of their host family a new friend.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls intern at a manufacturing firm where their work proves dull, however they manage to have fun with their host family.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stay with a family in Tennessee, where they play matchmakers once more, while their internship is with a wedding planner.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Before they leave for New York, Paris and Nicole stay with the family of a former beauty queen, who convinces Paris to take part in a pageant, while their internship is at a dentist's office.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take the place of a stay-at-home mom who has a young daughter, and also happens to be nine months pregnant!

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole trade in their designer dresses for traditional Pakistani attire when they take over the responsibilities of a Pakistani housewife.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole fill in for a housewife who feels her marriage is lacking a spark.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole spend the day tending to the needs and whims of four rambunctious kids.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole plan competing weddings for a lesbian couple.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole must take care of a toddler, as well as throw a party for his second birthday.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take a break from household chores and go on a family vacation.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are paired with a hard-to-please husband.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole visit an artistic family with varied talents.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris can’t stand to spend another day as a housewife and hires an impersonator to take her place, giving Nicole an opportunity to exact her revenge.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie say goodbye to their jet-setting lifestyle in Los Angeles, and move in with the Ledings, a family in Altus, Arkansas.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia: Grandpa in his Red Speedos and a Rainbow Bright Personal Ad
programme.desc: Fashion comes to Wipeout Australia as we meet Adam "God's Gift" Marshall, a self styled Ad man who conquers the Qualifier. Other Catwalk moments include the Grandpa in his Red Speedos and a Rainbow Bright Personal Ad.
programme.sub-title: Grandpa in his Red Speedos and a Rainbow Bright Personal Ad

programme.title: Wipeout Australia: Sweeper Writes Itself Into the History Books
programme.desc: It's no doubt that the 'Ball Crusher' Sweeper is the star of tonight's show. With a brother-sister team hanging by a thread and a three-way hurdle, this week's Sweeper writes itself into the history books.
programme.sub-title: Sweeper Writes Itself Into the History Books

programme.title: Wipeout Australia: Pro Wrestler Mikey Takes on Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Showdowns don't come more epic than this. Pro Wrestler Mikey takes on Wipeout Australias very own Tom Cruise. Its neck and neck through the qualifier which this week includes a real Mission Impossible, Dirty Balls.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia: Slippery Stairs and Wipeout Crash Cream
programme.desc: This week contestants on Wipeout Australia are bought undone by a seemingly simple obstacle on the Qualifier, the Slippery Stairs. It's all in the name really, an innocent set of stairs, covered in Wipeout Crash cream.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia: World's Strongest Dwarf, David Clarke and Gentle Giant, Tim Watts
